title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration to use Ollama models as LLM or chat backend.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, admin, model manager) – drop-in replacement for ChatGPT-UI.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with chat history, prompt templates, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub-Copilot-like VS-Code extension powered by Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models as generators or chatters in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template combining Ollama + LangChain + Chroma for local document Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers via Ollama models; supports slash commands and model switching.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama with streaming responses and thread support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from within notes.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node to integrate Ollama models into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector and PVC support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama with GenServer and streaming support.

title: ollama-rails
summary: Ruby gem that adds an Ollama client to Rails with ActiveRecord-like interface.
